name: Slack Filter: Directive-Reference Pre-filter
goal: Add deterministic regex pre-filter to _validate_brain_message that blocks Brain conversational responses before the LLM call, and suppress CONTEXT_REQUIRED for directive-missing messages to break the feedback loop

tasks.name: Write failing tests for pre-filter behavior

steps.expected: Two new test classes at end of file

steps.description: Run new tests to verify they fail (RED phase)

tasks.name: Implement directive-reference pre-filter in main.py
tasks.description: Add _DIRECTIVE_REF_RE and _BLOCKED_NO_DIRECTIVE constants, add pre-filter to _validate_brain_message, split CONTEXT_REQUIRED handler in poll_brain_responses
